learnings.summary: SQL Server Agent does not start on Express edition
learnings.detail: SQLEXPRESS on Intrusion is Express edition. sp_add_job succeeds but Agent service refuses to start. Use Windows Task Scheduler for automated jobs instead.
learnings.impact: Backup automation, any future scheduled SQL jobs

learnings.summary: Chrome extension fetch fails on Intrusion but PowerShell works
learnings.detail: All fetch() calls from Chrome extension JS return 'Failed to fetch' against localhost:3000 on Intrusion. Invoke-RestMethod succeeds from PowerShell. Server is healthy. Browser-side issue only.
learnings.impact: Use PowerShell for all API verification on Intrusion.

learnings.summary: TQde and TQdo: same codebase with AD role filtering
learnings.detail: Single web app. AD group membership determines panels and API routes. One IIS site, one Node process.
learnings.impact: Simplifies deployment. Design AD middleware after DB connectivity proven.

learnings.summary: Launcher = C# .NET single-file exe for MSI/MSIX
learnings.detail: Deployment launcher for ITD staff is thin native shell. Checks server reachability, opens browser, error dialog if unreachable. No Electron, no Node on client. ToiQaDon (Electron) is Christopher's dev console only.
learnings.impact: Clean separation: lightweight launcher for users, full dev console for Christopher

learnings.summary: Here-string + WriteAllText is the safe JS deployment path
learnings.detail: PowerShell @'...'@ here-string + [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText() preserves JS backslash escaping. Never use ToiQa /api/fs/write for JS.
learnings.impact: All future JS deployments use this pattern

learnings.summary: Git initialized for _DOCKSN, no remote yet
learnings.detail: Initial commit 1d97eb8, 32 files. No remote. Will go under ksnlabs or own repo during spring cleaning.
learnings.impact: Session start/end should include git status + commit
